text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a voice coming from my office. I crack
open the door and take a peek to find...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ngh... Why can't I move?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Come on, El! Don't make me count to three!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You can't lose, El! You gotta do a bunch of
trainin' today too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's hyping herself up, but she looks like she's
about to collapse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I need to reconsider her race
schedule before she burns out...
